title: Rentokil Rat Bait Station - Lockable - Tamper-Resistant & Reusable Bait Station for Rodent Control For - For Indoor and Outdoor Use - For use with Rat Baits
features: SECURE RODENT CONTROL: Provides a safe and effective way to control rats by keeping poison contained and protected from pets, children and non-target animals, Suitable for your choice of bait, including blocks, grain, or pasta bait, Suitable for homeowners, landlords and tenants needing reliable rodent protection

TAMPER RESISTANT DESIGN FOR PEACE OF MIND: The robust and lockable design of the unit helps to keep bait securely inside the station accessible only by rats, providing confidence when using rodenticides around the home
DURABLE AND REUSABLE BUILD: Made from tough, weather-resistant materials making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, Easy to unlock and refill for future rodent control

EASY TO SET UP AND POSITION: Simply unlock the station, place your chosen bait inside and close the lid, Place where rodent activity has been seen or where they have been feeding, Please only bait responsibly

EXPERTS IN PEST CONTROL: For over 100 years, RENTOKIL has been developing effective pest control solutions, Our range of DIY pest control products lets you bring that professional expertise into your own home and garden, Whether it's insects or rodents we have a solution you can trust
